title: CliffTree Spires: Amplified Enabler
description: Makes CliffTree generate an AMPLIFIED world!
body:
A drag-and-drop datapack that makes [**CliffTree**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/clifftree) generate worlds using the **AMPLIFIED** preset. 

Requires the appropriate CliffTree version to function. 

If CliffTree is loaded as a datapack, make sure this pack is loaded **above** CliffTree.
